title: deparia glabrata
intro: Deparia glabrata, also known as the smooth shield fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Deparia glabrata include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and supporting cardiovascular health. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures for its herbal benefits.
